cluster_articles.title: Cloudflare's 1.1.1.1 DNS outage root-caused to BGP config drift
cluster_articles.summary: Cloudflare's post-mortem attributes the 37-minute outage to an incorrect BGP community tag.

cluster_articles.title: Cloudflare publishes 1.1.1.1 outage post-mortem
cluster_articles.summary: The company promises tooling changes to prevent a recurrence.
